Introduction:

ROCm is a high-performance computing (HPC) software stack that provides optimized hardware acceleration for scientific and engineering applications. It supports various platforms, including GPUs, CPUs, and FPGAs, and offers a wide range of libraries and tools to help developers develop and deploy their applications efficiently.
